general.title: General
general.autostartHint: Start ITG Ray automatically when you log in.
general.startMinimizedHint: Open in background, no main window on launch.

connection.title: Connection
connection.networkModeHint: TUN intercepts all traffic at OS level. System proxy uses Windows proxy settings only.
connection.dnsHint: Override DNS while connected. Uses remote VPN DNS by default.
connection.allowLanHint: Reach local network devices (printers, NAS) while VPN is on.
connection.ipv6Hint: Disable IPv6 if your provider's IPv6 is broken and routing fails.
connection.interfaceCidrHint: TUN adapter IPv4 address and subnet. Default 198.18.0.1/15.
connection.mtuHint: TUN interface MTU in bytes. Default 1500. Range 576–9000.

killSwitch.title: Kill switch
killSwitch.blockOnDropHint: Cut the network if the tunnel goes down so traffic never leaks unprotected.
killSwitch.alwaysOnHint: Require an active VPN connection to use the network at all.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.defaultUpdateIntervalHint: How often subscriptions auto-sync, in seconds. Per-sub overrides take precedence.
subscriptions.userAgentHint: Sent with every subscription fetch. Most provider panels inspect this to choose the response format. Empty falls back to the built-in default.
subscriptions.sendHwidHint: Send a stable per-device identifier on every subscription fetch. Required by Remnawave-style providers with device limits.
subscriptions.sendDeviceOsHint: Include the OS family (e.g. Windows) alongside HWID.
subscriptions.sendOsVersionHint: Include the OS build (e.g. 10.0.22631) alongside HWID.
subscriptions.sendDeviceModelHint: Include the hardware model (e.g. MSI Stealth 16) alongside HWID.
subscriptions.metadataNote: Metadata sub-toggles are honored only when HWID is on.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.onConnectHint: Show an OS toast when the tunnel comes up.
notifications.onDisconnectHint: Show an OS toast when the tunnel drops.
notifications.onQuotaLowHint: Warn before a subscription's traffic budget runs out.
notifications.soundHint: Play a soft chime on state changes.
notifications.onSubSyncedHint: Notify when a subscription is synced.

helper.title: Helper service
helper.nonWindows: Helper service is only used on Windows builds. ITG Ray uses native APIs on this platform.
helper.statusHint: Privileged background service that manages TUN and routing.
helper.reinstallDescription: This will stop the running service, replace its registration, and start it again. The active connection will drop briefly.

logs.title: Logs
logs.logLevelHint: More detail helps when debugging connection issues, but fills disk faster.
logs.clearOldLogsHint: Delete log files older than 7 days.
